subcodes.first_line: Today, the most exalted and vital of all matters is steadfastness in the Cause of God, constancy and deep-rooted faith, and the education of souls, nay rather [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الیوم اعظم و اهم امور استقامت بر امرالله و ثبوت و رسوخست و تربیت نفوس بلکه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat], @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
